contract_summary: This function looks up a lapb_cb by net_device in the global lapb_list and acquires a reference on it via lapb_hold. It is a get-wrapper: the caller receives a pointer to the lapb_cb with an elevated refcount, and must call lapb_put when done. If no matching entry is found, NULL is returned. The caller must check the return value. The lookup is performed without locks, so the caller must ensure proper synchronization.
